# Aryan Panwar
> Gen AI Engineer & AI Product Manager building products that bridge hardware logic with AI orchestration.

## About
Aryan Panwar is a Gen AI Engineer who builds real products — from a live AI stylist app to open-source speech platforms. He specializes in bridging the gap between low-level hardware logic and high-level AI orchestration.

Projects:
- FitWardrobe: Privacy-first AI stylist app using on-device Gemini Vision.
- Mithivoices: Open-source TTS/STT platform with 19 neural voices.
- SEO & GEO Optimizer Skill: Universal AI skill for search & generative search optimization.
- Wireless EV Charger: 85% efficient IPT system with Embedded C firmware.
